name: jaf-known-bad-fixture
//: A DELIBERATELY-BROKEN fixture app (see ../README.md). qa-canonical needs an app.json + a package.json with an `expo` dep to detect surface=rn, so the RN/parity/theme/testing rules actually run against it. `firebase` is here on purpose to trip telemetry/no-analytics-deps. There is intentionally NO `scripts.test` (trips test/script-present) and NO eas.json (trips rn/eas-json-shape). Nothing here is installed — it is scanned, never built.
